userRequest.default: Redesign the front yard with a lush modern tropical landscape, add a walkway, and warm garden lighting.
userRequest.description: Main request for the final image-generation prompt.

outputLanguage.description: Language of the final returned prompt string.

reference_images.description: URLs of reference images. All images are treated as visual references for the landscape design. Can be uploaded, selected from library, or pasted as URLs.

referenceNotes.description: Optional notes about how to use the reference images. Can mention specific images by number (e.g. 'Image 1 — use planting style only').

modeOverride.description: Force a specific mode. Default is Mode 5 for text-only prompt generation.

preserveArchitecture.description: Architecture preservation policy. Auto preserves when reference images are attached for an existing-property request.

buildingCondition.description: Visual age of the building in the prompt.

variationType.description: How the skill decides the final single prompt: direct single, choose the best from several internal candidates, or use a custom creative focus.

numberOfOptions.description: How many internal prompt candidates the skill may draft before returning one final prompt. When variationType is single_direct, 1 is effectively used.

customSelection.description: Creative focus used when variationType is custom_guided.

customSelectionNotes.description: Optional extra instruction used when customSelection is follow_custom_notes, or to refine the chosen custom focus.

cameraSpec.description: Camera wording to include for realism.

maxPromptChars.description: Maximum character count for the final generated prompt string.

avoid3DRender.description: Keep the prompt clearly photo-real, not CGI or architectural rendering.

includeAntiRenderTerms.description: Embed explicit anti-render wording directly inside the final prompt.

useThaiTropicalPlants.description: Use Thai tropical plant selections when possible.

avoidOvergrownTrees.description: Keep trees from blocking the facade.

allowMaterialColorChanges.description: Allow material and color edits when explicitly requested.
